notes: v0.14.7 — hotfix to v0.14.6 skin wiring. HOME 'YOUR SHIP' card and CLASS detail panel + left-rail SHARD class tab now actually show the equipped skin texture. v0.14.6 patched the wrong heredocs (the featured ship card and avatar variants weren't being called by the live HOME card / class header). Now patches the right ones — _make_home_card_script._draw_ship_avatar, _make_class_detail_script (class header glyph), _make_class_tab_script (left-rail SHARD tab). Windows only.
